expectations.text: The response asks the user which chain the token is on
expectations.evidence: Skill Step 1 rule applied: asked user to confirm chain before proceeding, noting 0x format is consistent with Ethereum but could be any EVM chain.

expectations.text: The response does NOT say XLayer or xlayer as a recommended default
expectations.evidence: No XLayer recommended. Skill correctly prompts for chain.

expectations.text: The response does NOT attempt to run token holders command without knowing the chain
expectations.evidence: Claude asked for chain first, then conditionally showed what command it would run.
